data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the persona scenario regarding photo documentation at the job site. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the expected outcome of this scenario. The linked use cases outline the need for photo documentation but lack specific evidence to demonstrate compliance, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the outcome of the photo documentation scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the photo documentation requirement.
